articles.title: The race to replace Starmer is on - but he still faces a momentous choice
articles.description: Labour is consumed by drama, but the PM still faces big decisions - and what could be his final choice.

articles.title: Trump warns Taiwan against declaring independence, hours after summit with China's Xi
articles.description: The US president says he wants Beijing and Taipei to "cool down" tensions over the self-governing island.

articles.title: Thousands of officers deployed as crowds gather for London protests
articles.description: The Metropolitan Police has called the operation to police rival marches, one organised by Tommy Robinson and a separate pro-Palestinian protest, as one of the most significant in recent years.

articles.title: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
articles.description: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.
